description: A wide-angle photograph captures an extensive landscape of coastal sand dunes, characteristic of an arid environment. In the foreground and mid-ground, numerous light brown sand dunes are visible, interspersed with patches of dark green, scrubby vegetation. A thin, light-coloured pole stands vertically amidst the vegetation on the right side. The distant background features the blue expanse of the ocean under a hazy sky, with what appears to be a small white buoy or boat far out at sea. This photograph depicts a dune environment within the Doñana Natura 2000 site in Southern Spain. Credits: M. Palacios.
